display.purpose: Hero headlines, intro title, and high-personality page moments.

headline.purpose: Section titles and major page landmarks.

title.purpose: Project, experiment, writing, and journey item titles.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, metadata, status labels, and category markers.

shadows.name: social-hover-lift
shadows.value: 0 0.75rem 1.6rem color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent), 0 0 0 0.28rem color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 7%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Round icon links on hover and focus.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Primary state transitions, intro motion, and panel entry.

motion.name: road-story
motion.purpose: Road path and car story animation.

components.name: Primary Pill Action
components.description: Compact filled pill for primary section actions.
components.html: Follow the journey
components.css: .ds-primary-pill { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #171511; border-radius: 999px; background: #171511; color: #f6f2ea; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-primary-pill:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, #171511 82%, #2458f5); } .ds-primary-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2458f5; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-button-arrow { display: inline-flex; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, #f6f2ea 64%, transparent); border-radius: 999px; } .ds-button-arrow svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; transition: transform 300ms ease-out; } .ds-primary-pill:hover svg { transform: translateX(0.125rem); }

components.name: Secondary Outline Pill
components.description: Outlined pill for secondary navigation and return actions.
components.html: Say hello
components.css: .ds-outline-pill { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #171511; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #171511; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-outline-pill:hover { background: #171511; color: #f6f2ea; } .ds-outline-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2458f5; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-outline-pill .ds-button-arrow { display: inline-flex; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-outline-pill svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; transition: transform 300ms ease-out; } .ds-outline-pill:hover svg { transform: translateX(0.125rem); }

components.name: Navigation Sticker
components.description: Sticky warm-paper navigation with brand block, anchor pills, and language toggle.
components.html:
Sixseven LabsAI Native
JourneyProjectsWriting
components.css: .ds-nav-sticker { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, #171511 13%, transparent); border-radius: 1.15rem; background: #fbf7ef; color: #171511; padding: 0.72rem 0.76rem; box-shadow: 0 0.8rem 2rem color-mix(in oklch, #171511 3%, transparent); font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; min-width: 0; } .ds-nav-avatar { width: 2.4rem; height: 2.4rem; border-radius: 0.78rem; background: #f6f2ea; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, #171511 14%, transparent); } .ds-nav-brand strong { display: block; font-family: Outfit, Avenir Next, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-nav-brand small { display: block; margin-top: 0.25rem; color: #6b655b; font-size: 0.66rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-list { display: flex; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-nav-list a { border-radius: 999px; color: #6b655b; padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-list a:hover, .ds-nav-list a:focus-visible { color: #171511; outline: 0; } .ds-lang { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, #171511 14%, transparent); border-radius: 999px; background: #f6f2ea; padding: 0.25rem; } .ds-lang button { min-width: 2.25rem; min-height: 2.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #6b655b; font-weight: 800; } .ds-lang button[aria-pressed="true"] { background: #171511; color: #f6f2ea; }

components.name: Keyword Marquee Chip
components.description: Small moving label with electric dot for topic keywords.
components.css: .ds-marquee-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; white-space: nowrap; color: #6b655b; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-marquee-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #2458f5; }

components.name: Ledger Row
components.description: Project row that uses numbers, hairlines, and compact metadata.
components.html:
01

Wallet tracking + signal alerts

Sol Tracker

Solana wallet tracking, price signals, and Telegram alerts.

Next.js / Supabase / Helius / Telegram Bot
components.css: .ds-ledger-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 4rem minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(14rem, 0.46fr); gap: 2rem; align-items: start; border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, #171511 16%, transparent); padding: 1.5rem 0; color: #171511; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-ledger-index { font-family: Outfit, Avenir Next, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.07em; line-height: 1; } .ds-ledger-meta { margin: 0; color: #6b655b; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-ledger-row h3 { margin: 0.45rem 0 0; font-family: Outfit, Avenir Next, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.6vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -0.055em; line-height: 1; } .ds-ledger-summary { max-width: 48rem; margin: 0.55rem 0 0; color: #6b655b; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.65; } .ds-ledger-stack { max-width: 18rem; margin: 0; color: #6b655b; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.55; text-align: right; }

narrative.overview:
Sixseven Labs is a composed personal brand surface for a creator whose proof lives in projects, experiments, writing, and public trajectory. The system feels like a warm field ledger: structured rows, clear labels, tactile paper surfaces, and a few signature interactions that make the path memorable.

The site uses professional restraint as its default posture. Typography carries authority, hairlines organize the page, and warm neutrals keep the reading environment calm. Blue and violet accents appear as precise annotations across focus states, motion anchors, and selected marks.

Chinese leads the narrative, English supports the structure, and both languages stay compact. The strongest visual moments are the native intro, the journey road, the keyword marquee, the sticky navigation sticker, and ledger-style project rows.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper canvas with ink-first typography.
Hairline-led sections with dense, readable content rhythm.
Heavy Outfit headings paired with steady Plus Jakarta Sans body copy.
Rounded pills and circular avatar geometry used as signature shapes.
Motion that reveals trajectory and respects reduced-motion preferences.

rules.name: The Annotation Rule
rules.body: Blue works as a mark of intent: focus, action, selection, and tiny movement cues.

rules.name: The Paper First Rule
rules.body: Large surfaces stay in the warm paper family so the site feels calm, readable, and personal.

rules.name: The Bilingual Priority Rule
rules.body: Chinese carries the primary narrative; English clarifies and supports with quieter rhythm.

rules.name: The Compact Authority Rule
rules.body: Headings are heavy and tight. Body copy stays open enough for scanning and long enough for trust.

rules.name: The Ledger Line Rule
rules.body: Sections, rows, ledgers, and strips use hairline dividers as their primary structure.

rules.name: The Responsive Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows intensify through interaction: hover, focus, scroll, and animated story moments.

dos: Do keep the site in light mode with warm paper surfaces.
Do let Chinese lead and use English as clean support text.
Do use hairline rules for structure before adding boxes.
Do preserve electric blue for action, selection, focus, and small animated marks.
Do use Outfit for bold headings and Plus Jakarta Sans for bilingual body copy.
Do keep focus states obvious with a 2px Electric Annotation Blue outline and 4px offset.
Do respect reduced-motion settings across new animations.
donts: Don't make the site feel like a polished corporate portfolio.
Don't use overly formal resume language as the main brand voice.
Don't replace the current ledger rhythm with generic case-study tiles.
Don't turn project sections into identical icon-card grids.
Don't use purple-blue gradients as the main identity device.
Don't add glass panels, blur-heavy surfaces, or decorative gradient text.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders on cards, alerts, rows, or callouts.
